questions.question: Name the 1957 Oscar-winning movie where British POWs are forced to build the Japanese a railway during World War II, featuring Alec Guinness and William Holden.
This 1964 military-themed doll gave boys an action figure with which to play.
What prolific singer/songwriter cemented his place in the 1960's protest movement with the album The Times They Are A-Changin'?
In 1962, what American astronaut was the first to orbit the earth?
What did it mean if someone asked you to "gimme some skin"?
questions.answer: To slap or shake your hand in greeting or agreement
